arts.ttl: Video: Man City Bottles Their Lead as Bradley Barcola Levels for PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain conceded two goals to start the second half against Manchester City, but the capital club responded with two goals of their own. After cutting the deficit to 2-1 following a goal from Ousmane Dembélé, the home side leveled the scoring thanks to a goal from Bradley Barcola. arts.ttl: PSG see opening goal against Man City ruled out after Nuno Mendes' KNEE is offside in Champions League clash
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain were disappointed just before half-time after their would-be opening goal was ruled out for offside in their Champions League clash with Manchester City on Wednesday evening.

arts.ttl: Manchester City accused of encouraging Bah to break Valladolid contract
arts.sum: Spanish club threaten legal action over defender Sierra Leonean missed training on Tuesday Real Valladolid have accused Manchester City of advising their defender Juma Bah to break his contract and not train on Tuesday to force a cheaper move to the Premier League champions, with the Spanish club threatening legal action. Bah, an 18-year-old centre-back, joined Valladolid in August and became the first Sierra Leonean to play in La Liga. The club say Bah has bought out his youth contract after refusing to sign a senior deal that would have made him more expensive. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Romano CONFIRMS Chelsea approach for top Man City target
arts.sum: Chelsea have approached Juventus over a loan for Douglas Luiz, according to Fabrizio Romano. So far, Juventus have only received loan approaches from Luiz's suitors, which have chiefly included Man City .

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: PSG-Man City, Madrid-Salzburg
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Wednesday's Champions League action as Paris Saint-Germain host Manchester City, Real Madrid take on RB Salzburg and Arsenal face Dinamo Zagreb.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina’s Bid for Ndour Could Unlock Skriniar’s Move to Fenerbahce
arts.sum: Fiorentina have emerged as a key player in a complex transfer scenario involving Paris Saint-Germain (PSG), Juventus, and Fenerbahce. Calciomercato report that the Viola have submitted a formal offer to PSG for the permanent transfer of Cher Ndour, a move that could have far-reaching implications for several high-profile transfers.
